story_title: Attachment UI with File Selection and Validation

questions.question: Does the attachment button follow the same disabled conditions as the Send button?
questions.actionable_check: Review AttachmentButton props and ConversationPane integration to verify disabled logic matches canSend conditions
questions.pass_criteria: Button disabled when no identity or no contact selected, matching Send button conditions

questions.question: Are file size validation tests comprehensive?
questions.actionable_check: Review attachment-validation.test.ts for size limit tests including boundary cases
questions.pass_criteria: Tests exist for: under limit accepts, over limit rejects, exact limit boundary, zero-size file

questions.question: Are MIME type validation tests comprehensive?
questions.actionable_check: Review attachment-validation.test.ts for MIME type tests covering supported and unsupported types
questions.pass_criteria: Tests cover: all supported types accept (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, MP4, WebM, MP3, OGG, WAV, PDF), unsupported types reject

questions.question: Does the IPC file dialog handler use Electron's dialog.showOpenDialog correctly?
questions.actionable_check: Review handlers.ts for system:show-open-dialog handler implementation
questions.pass_criteria: Handler imports dialog from electron, passes options, returns file paths or undefined on cancel

questions.question: Is the preload bridge properly configured for attachment APIs?
questions.actionable_check: Review preload/index.ts for attachment-related API exposure
questions.pass_criteria: Preload exposes showOpenDialog and blob storage methods via contextBridge

questions.question: Do property-based tests verify validation logic invariants?
questions.actionable_check: Review attachment-validation.test.ts for property-based tests using fast-check
questions.pass_criteria: Property tests verify: all oversized files rejected regardless of MIME, all valid MIME + valid size accepted

questions.question: Does the preview strip component support multiple attachments with remove buttons?
questions.actionable_check: Review AttachmentPreviewStrip component for multi-attachment rendering and remove functionality
questions.pass_criteria: Component renders multiple attachments, each with remove button, supports horizontal scroll

mandatory_questions.question: Is there any dead code introduced by this story?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Search for unused functions, classes, imports in AttachmentButton/, AttachmentPreviewStrip/, hooks/useAttachments.ts, utils/attachment-validation.ts, ipc/blob-storage-handlers.ts
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No unused code in story scope

mandatory_questions.question: Are there any duplicate implementations?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check for similar logic to other components or utilities that could be shared
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No duplicate implementations; follows existing patterns consistently

mandatory_questions.question: Do integration tests validate the story's workflow?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Verify validation logic is tested end-to-end; component integration verified
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: At least one test validates the complete file validation pipeline
